intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把几句最有故事感的句子读顺。

sentences.text: Last week I went to the theatre.
sentences.focus_zh: 注意 Last week 和 went to 的节奏。

sentences.text: A young man and a young woman were sitting behind me.
sentences.focus_zh: 把 a young man / a young woman 两组读清楚。
注意 were talking 的连贯和 loudly 的尾音。

sentences.text: In the end, I could not bear it.
sentences.focus_zh: In the end 后面稍停，再读 could not bear it。

sentences.text: It's none of your business, the young man said rudely.
sentences.focus_zh: 注意 none of your business 是一句完整的情绪。
private conversation 是这一课的核心短语，重音要清楚。
